notes: Exported from Word or Google Docs; Apache Tika extracts clean ordered text; best format across all ATS
Native Word format; excellent parsing on Workday and iCIMS; slight edge over PDF on legacy ATS
Image-heavy or embedded font PDF; Tika extracts degraded text; column interleaving common
Columns merge into scrambled text in ATS extraction; skills and experience sections become unreadable
No text layer; OCR fallback is imperfect; near-zero parse success on strict ATS
Clean single-column LaTeX generates excellent text extraction; only risk is non-standard section headers
Nearly identical to Word PDF export; reliable text layer; recommended for users without Word
